bucket_target.rationale: Growth-inflation regime, positive 10y-2y slope, low VIX and risk_on score support moderate risk. But CPI 3.3%, concentrated positioning, only middling breadth, and geopolitical/event risk argue against max risk. Favor global over KR equities, keep some FX/commodity inflation hedge, underweight duration but retain bonds and cash buffer.

rationale: risk_parity with single-asset cap 20% AND bucket constraints (strict bucket equality). 위험자산 target 62.0%.
